details.test: Task 1: Add two 20x30 heavy-duty waterproof tarps under $150 to the cart
Task 2: Choose the thickest tarp under $120 and add 1 to the cart
Task 3: Select a mid-priced tarp with environment/rating filters and add to cart
Task 4: Build a bulk order of three different tarps with specified quantities
Task 5: Save two UV-resistant tarps to favorites (highest-rated and cheapest)
Task 6: Choose product with lowest effective price per unit and add one pack to cart
Task 7: Configure custom 18x24 blue vinyl tarp with grommets and reinforced corners
Task 8: Begin checkout and select Standard Ground shipping before payment
